ASR Tactical 5.25 Inch Compact Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED Flashlight Wrist Strap

ASR Tactical Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED Flashlight may only measure 5.25 inches but, it comes with great and practical built-in features that will make it your go to flashlight—read on!

-5-Stage Switch: easily maneuver between SOS, Strobe, Low, Medium and High light -Adjustable focus head (zoom in or out between x1, x250, x500, x1000 or x2000) -500 Lumen brightness -10W LED bulb -Glow in the dark on/off button -Convenient wrist strap -Patrial texturized handle

Key Features

  • 5- STAGE SWITCH TACTICAL FLASHLIGHT: This multi-mode LED tactical flashlight comes with five stages including low, mid, high, SOS and lastly strobe; easily switch between the five modes by engaging the pressure push on/off button at the back of the flashlight
  • ADJUSTABLE FOCUS HEAD: By simply pushing and pulling the flashlight body in and out, the beam of LED light will be easily adjustable depending on the intended or needed use; zoom in or out between x1, x250, x500, x1000 or x2000; the flashlight also features a texturized grip for easy handling and comfort
  • GLOW IN THE DARK ON/OFF BUTTON: The ASR Tactical Black Compact Multi Mode 500 Lumen LED flashlight comes with a convenient pressure push on/off button that glows in the dark, allowing you to easily and quickly access the power end of the flashlight
  • HANDY WRIST STRAP: Featuring a useful and handy wrist strap, secure the compact, LED tactical flashlight around your wrist when in use; when not employed, use the strap to attach to a backpack, inner pocket, work bag and more via carabiner or clip making it easy to locate and store
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 5.25 inches; Color: Black; Watt: 10W; Lumen: 500; Batteries: x3 AAA required (not included)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRT500FL
  • UPC: 810058484789
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 5.25 in

Compact, lightweight and easy to handle, this ASR Outdoor multi-mode flashlight is meant to perform for any at home, field or tactical work needs and tasks. The flashlight as mentioned above, comes with a handy wrist strap that allows you to secure the tactical tool to your wrist when employed; the wrist strap also makes it easy to attach to an inner pocket, backpack or work bag via a clip or carabiner for storage or travel when not in use.

Length: 5.25 inches

Batteries: x3 AAA (not included)
